title: I Always Wanted to Be a Gangster
original_title: J'ai toujours rêvé d'être un gangster
overview: Told in four vignettes, this existential comedy relates the exploits of four aspiring criminals who hope to improve their lot, but find that they might not have what it takes for a life of crime.

trailers.title: J'AI TOUJOURS REVE D ETRE UN GANGSTER - Bande Annonce VF
